# hostinger_agency_hosting_domains (Data Source)

Lists domains linked to Agency Plan websites.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `website_uids` (List of String) Filter domains to specific website UIDs.

### Read-Only

- `domains` (Attributes List) The list of domains linked to Agency Plan websites. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--domains))

<a id="nestedatt--domains"></a>
### Nested Schema for `domains`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp of when the domain was created.
- `fqdn` (String) Fully qualified domain name.
- `website_uid` (String) UID of the owning website.
